summary: The CDC and WHO guidelines support concurrent administration of non-COVID-19 vaccines with the COVID-19 vaccine due to no significant safety concerns or reduced efficacy. This practice enhances vaccination coverage without compromising protection against SARS-CoV-2 infection.
